creator: gamato@users.sourceforge.net
text:
Hallo,

I've installed archivers/xarchive but it is failing to open many files (archives) without any special chars in their filenames, like in the example below.
Note that some files get opened while others don't and I cannot see any reason for this behaviour.

Regards,

Martin

-- 

$ ll bsd-splash-changer.tgz
-rw-r-----  1 mato  mato  1524 Feb 12  2006 bsd-splash-changer.tgz
$ xarchive bsd-splash-changer.tgz
dir: /home/mato/.xarchive/wrappers
no wrappers in /home/mato/.xarchive/wrappers
dir: /usr/local/lib/xarchive/wrappers
Found 8 wrappers
program dpkg-deb not found
extentions deb ignored
rpm2cpio required by /usr/local/lib/xarchive/wrappers/rpm-wrap.sh, but not found
extentions rpm ignored
dir:
no wrappers in
XArchive 0.2.8-6
Lee Bigelow <ligelowbee@yahoo.com>

Wrappers found and their supported file extensions:

/usr/local/lib/xarchive/wrappers/7za-wrap.sh
    Extentions: *.7z

/usr/local/lib/xarchive/wrappers/ace-wrap.sh
    Extentions: *.ace

/usr/local/lib/xarchive/wrappers/arj-wrap.sh
    Extentions: *.arj

/usr/local/lib/xarchive/wrappers/deb-wrap.sh
    Extentions: ** Needed program not found, ignored **

/usr/local/lib/xarchive/wrappers/rar-wrap.sh
    Extentions: *.rar *.cbr

/usr/local/lib/xarchive/wrappers/rpm-wrap.sh
    Extentions: ** Needed program not found, ignored **

/usr/local/lib/xarchive/wrappers/tar-wrap.sh
    Extentions: *.tar *.tar.gz *.tgz *.tar.bz *.tbz *.tar.bz2 *.tbz2 *.tar.z

/usr/local/lib/xarchive/wrappers/zip-wrap.sh
    Extentions: *.zip *.cbz *.jar

[Invalid UTF-8] from main.c: No wrapper found for archive \x10\x8d\xab\x06\x96\x
aa\x04\x08
$

How-To-Repeat: Please see the full description for details.
